Polymarket Bitcoin October Price Market Locks in ↑126k at 100% Probability | YES | HIGH confidence** [1]

Polymarket's "What price will Bitcoin hit in October?" prediction market, with over $43 million in volume, now shows **↑126k** as the sole frontrunner at 100% implied probability, followed closely by **↑124k** also at 100%, reflecting real-time trader consensus on Bitcoin reaching at least $12
